client-only.description: Static React client-only app: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind + shadcn. Deploys to GitHub Pages and Docker/Nginx.

hono-cloudflare.description: pnpm monorepo: Vite + React frontend, Hono API on Cloudflare Workers, shared Zod schemas in packages/shared.

vars.deploy_targets: Cloudflare Workers (api), Cloudflare Pages or GitHub Pages (web)

express-fullstack.description: pnpm monorepo: Vite + React frontend, Express 5 backend with Socket.io scaffolding, shared Zod schemas. Railway and Docker deploy.
